ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position played by the player (e.g., F, D) */,
  "age" REAL /* Age of the player */,
  "draft_year" INTEGER /* Year the player was drafted */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the player */,
  "height" TEXT /* Height of the player */,
  "weight" TEXT /* Weight of the player */,
  "shoots" TEXT /* Shooting preference (left or right) */,
  "draft_eligibility_year" INTEGER /* Year the player becomes eligible for the draft */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season record */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player */,
  "season_year" INTEGER /* Year of the season */,
  "nhle" REAL /* NHL equivalency value for the player during the season */,
  "rights_status" TEXT /* Rights status of the player (e.g., signed, unsigned) */,
  "league_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the league */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team */,
  "games_played" INTEGER /* Number of games played by the player during the season */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Total points (goals + assists) scored by the player during the season */,
  "plus_minus" INTEGER /* Plus-minus rating of the player during the season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_seasons_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "league" TEXT /* League in which the team plays (e.g., nhl, ahl, czech) */,
  "division" TEXT /* Division of the team within the league */,
  "stadium_name" TEXT /* Name of the stadium where the team plays home games */,
  "stadium_capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the stadium */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "head_coach" TEXT /* Name of the team's head coach */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_teams" (
  "player_team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player-team record */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the season */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date when the player joined the team */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date when the player left the team or the current date if still on the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_teams_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_teams_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance record */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the season */,
  "goals" INTEGER /* Number of goals scored by the player */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Number of assists made by the player */,
  "penalty_minutes" INTEGER /* Total penalty minutes incurred by the player */,
  "plus_minus" INTEGER /* Plus-minus rating of the player during the season */,
  "faceoff_wins" INTEGER /* Number of faceoffs won by the player */,
  "faceoff_losses" INTEGER /* Number of faceoffs lost by the player */,
  "shots_on_goal" INTEGER /* Number of shots on goal by the player */,
  "hits" INTEGER /* Number of hits made by the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "drafts" (
  "draft_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each draft record */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player being drafted */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team that drafted the player */,
  "draft_year" INTEGER /* Year of the draft */,
  "round" INTEGER /* Round in which the player was selected */,
  "overall_pick" INTEGER /* Overall draft pick number */,
  "college" TEXT /* Name of the college or junior team the player came from, if applicable */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("draft_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_drafts_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_drafts_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "leagues" (
  "league_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each league */,
  "league_name" TEXT /* Name of the league (e.g., NHL, AHL, OHL) */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of league (e.g., professional, junior) */,
  "founding_year" INTEGER /* Year the league was founded */,
  "number_of_teams" INTEGER /* Number of teams in the league */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("league_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "positions" (
  "position_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each position */,
  "position_name" TEXT /* Full name of the position (e.g., Forward, Defenseman) */,
  "abbreviation" TEXT /* Abbreviation used for the position (e.g., F, D) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the position */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("position_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "scouting_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each scouting report */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player being assessed */,
  "scout_id" INTEGER /* ID of the scout issuing the report */,
  "analysis" TEXT /* Content of the analysis */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the report was created */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position the scout evaluated the player at */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Numerical rating of the player's overall potential */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or observations made by the scout */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scouting_reports_scout_id FOREIGN KEY ("scout_id") REFERENCES scouts ("scout_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scouting_reports_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "scouts" (
  "scout_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each scout */,
  "scout_name" TEXT /* Name of the scout */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Team associated with the scout */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email of the scout */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the scout */,
  "years_of_experience" INTEGER /* Number of years the scout has been in the profession */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("scout_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for overall statistics record */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player */,
  "total_goals" INTEGER /* Total goals scored across seasons */,
  "total_assists" INTEGER /* Total assists made across seasons */,
  "total_penalty_minutes" INTEGER /* Total penalty minutes incurred across seasons */,
  "total_points" INTEGER /* Total points (goals + assists) scored across seasons */,
  "total_faceoff_wins" INTEGER /* Total faceoffs won across seasons */,
  "total_faceoff_losses" INTEGER /* Total faceoffs lost across seasons */,
  "total_shots_on_goal" INTEGER /* Total shots on goal across seasons */,
  "total_hits" INTEGER /* Total hits made across seasons */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rights" (
  "rights_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for rights record */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team holding the rights */,
  "rights_type" TEXT /* Type of rights (e.g., signed, unsigned) */,
  "contract_expiration_year" INTEGER /* Year when the player's contract with the team expires */,
  "salary" INTEGER /* Player's salary */,
  "contract_type" TEXT /* Type of contract (e.g., entry-level, standard) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rights_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rights_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rights_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for analytics record */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player */,
  "nhle" REAL /* NHL equivalency value */,
  "star_percentage" REAL /* Probability of becoming a star player */,
  "make_percentage" REAL /* Probability of making the league */,
  "potential_rating" INTEGER /* Numerical rating of the player's potential */,
  "injury_risk" REAL /* Player's injury risk percentage */,
  "development_trajectory" TEXT /* Textual description of the player's development trajectory */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_analytics_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)
